text:
The event was held at the NPS headquarters at Vigilance House, Nairobi.

In Summary

Audio By Vocalize

The National Police Service on Wednesday honoured police athletes who won medals at the just concluded Paris Olympics.

The event was held at the NPS headquarters at Vigilance House, Nairobi.

Acting IG of Police Gilbert Masengeli crowned the athletes.

They include double Olympic gold medalist in the women's 1500m and 1000m Beatrice Chebet and women's 800m bronze medalist Mary Moraa.

Bronze medalist in men's 3000m steeplechase, Abraham Kibiwot, was also crowned during the event witnessed by Javelin thrower Julius Yego and world record holder in women's 3000m steeplechase Beatrice Chepkoech.

Athletes' representative at the Paris Olympics, Milka Chemos was also present.
title: [PHOTOS] Acting police IG Masengeli honours NPS Olympic medalists
description: The event was held at the NPS headquarters at Vigilance House, Nairobi.
